Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5001 0 0}Aigis, there's something that I wanted to ask you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Is it possible that you can no longer activate Orgia Mode?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5049 0 0}Just as I thought. Something felt off when I was backing you up in combat...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}But it didn't look like you were malfunctioning. What could be the reason?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}I thought something was off when I was backing you up in combat. As for what's causing it, well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}It doesn't look like you're malfunctioning, but... How should I put it...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It's almost as if you forgot how to activate it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}It looks like Metis is able to activate Orgia Mode.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 0 0 0}But I don't think you're malfunctioning. Honestly, it's almost as if...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It's as if... you forgot how to activate it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_008_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What was that reading you picked up?

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Kirijo-senpai is looking for anything that could give us a clue about what's going on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}This is just a theory, but... I think the area below the lounge was originally storage space.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}However, because the Abyss of Time appeared, whatever was stored down there got all jumbled up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Junpei-kun and Koro-chan are looking for any exits that we could use to get supplies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Since they're not planning to go too far, they'll be all right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}It just appeared out of nowhere and then disappeared. I couldn't tell what it was.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}It does bother me a little, but for now we should concentrate on exploring the area. We have too little intel at the moment...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Looks like this place really isn't connected to anywhere outside...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}It's just like the dorms. Whenever we try to leave, some invisible force just pushes us back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}It looks like it'll take Kirijo-senpai a little more time to search for intel.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}I'm currently going through all the documents she's found so far, but it shouldn't take too long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}There's a lot we have now, so I'm sure we'll find something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5001 0 0}The feeling I had when we all saw Amada-kun's memory is similar to the one I have when I'm backing you up in fights.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It's right in front of you, but you have no physical body. All you can do is... watch.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}I never expected I'd be able to share that feeling with all of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}I'm slowly going through all the documents that Kirijo-senpai found. However...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}A number of them are almost... religious in nature. They're a bit hard to sift through for useful information.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5053 0 0}Sorry, but could you wait just a little longer on this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5004 0 0}We used to use the bulletin board a lot, didn't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Feels a little weird we're not using it at all now even though we're exploring again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}I don't think any of us ever thought we'd have to continually explore like we are now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5077 0 0}I never really thought too much about it, but I wonder if everyone outside the dorm is okay.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}I just... thought about my family a little.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}I wonder if that figure we keep seeing has some kind of motive. And if so, what could it be?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Do you remember what Metis first said about this place?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}She said that the Abyss of Time was originally a small, self-contained space...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5070 0 0}That actually might be true. It matches up with the information on the notes we've found.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}I guess she was telling the truth this whole time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5001 0 0}I really don't think Metis is lying to us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}I think... she just really wants to protect you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}We've all been saying that Metis acts pretty childish...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}But maybe she really is a child at heart. If that's the case, maybe we're the ones who should be reaching out to her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5056 0 0}Sorry for saying weird things while we've been exploring. We really don't know a thing about that figure...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}Sorry, I'll try to figure it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5084 0 0}I count on you for a lot of things, Aigis, and... I understand that it's hard to make a decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}But if I side with you on this, then the others...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 -1 0 0}I just don't know what to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}No... Of course you're not okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5083 0 0}I think... you made the right choice, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It's like what Yukari-chan said. I've thought about it and... my mind is made up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}I'll support you, and I'll be your navigator... until the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}If it wasn't for you, I probably would've been swept up in all of this and wouldn't have been able to make my own decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}Even though it was such an important one to make. So... thank you, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}Once we're done with this final battle, we can use the true key and...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Um... You know how to use the true key, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5029 0 0}R-Right. Sorry, I got a little nervous there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5053 0 0}I'm sorry... You're probably more scared about this than I am, Aigis. And I just...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 -1 0 0}It's hard for me to put it into words, but... This kind of reminds me of January 31st.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Once we're done with this final battle, we can use the true key and...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}I'm scared, but being scared isn't going to help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5002 0 0}Oh, Aigis. Would you like to study together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}We found that {f 4 4 0 37 1 16782} in the Abyss of Time, didn't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}I just figured that in times like these, it's nice to have something familiar to fall back on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_200_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time with Fuuka-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5039 0 0}Thanks. I actually invited Metis, too. She said she was interested in what high schoolers study.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}Well, if you decide you want to, feel free to join. I'll see you later, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5002 0 0}Are you still busy, Aigis? If not, we could study together... If you feel like it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5004 0 0}Oh, Aigis. Do you have some time right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Um, I'd like to watch that {f 4 4 0 37 1 16783} with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It looks like it's simple enough, but I wanted to get your opinion on it as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5043 0 0}Thanks! I wasn't sure if I'd understand all of it on my own, so I'm glad you'll watch it with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Well, maybe we can when you're less busy? I'll see you later, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5077 0 0}Are you still busy? I was wondering if we could watch that DVD together...[n]{f 1 1}
